positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical arrangement featuring celestial elements intertwined with lush botanical motifs. Central composition is dominated by a majestic, stylized full moon cradling delicate, bioluminescent flora and a pair of abstract, mythical winged creatures in flight. Use deep indigo and cosmic violet as the primary color palette, contrasting sharply with metallic gold and luminous cyan accents. The style should resemble intricate woodblock print illustration mixed with ethereal stained glass patterns, creating strong, defined silhouettes and high visual contrast suitable for apparel printing. Clean vector aesthetic, maximalist symmetry, deep depth of field, perfect for textile printing.
